choice: Asset is the umbrella entity. Two kinds in v1: synced (E*TRADE account, balance from API) and manual (hand-entered value — real estate and other low-liquidity holdings — with an optional simple growth assumption). Every Asset declares a bucket: post-tax, tax-deferred, or non-drawable. The simulation spends only from drawable buckets; income streams attached to any asset still flow in. Net worth includes everything.
rationale: User added manually valued assets for real estate / low-liquidity holdings; non-drawable keeps home equity out of spendable money
